metadata.title: EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, selected articles) → AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated) (Concept Crosswalk)
metadata.schema-basis: NIST IR 8477 relationship vocabulary + NIST IR 8278A r1 STRM resource model

source-document.title: EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR, selected articles)
source-document.author: European Union

reference-document.title: AppSec Core V1 (with ACR-001, ACR-002, ACR-004 incorporated)
reference-document.author: SbD-ToE Programme — AppSec Core ontology project

metadata.methodology: Threshold-based continuous→categorical translation: sim≥0.6 → equal; 0.4≤sim<0.6 → intersects-with; sim<0.4 → unspecified. Multi-claim per source-item: one row per (source-item, target-Core-entity) unique pair using highest-similarity claim for that target. is-primary="true" marks item overall highest-similarity claim's target. subset-of / superset-of NOT in first cut (cosine similarity lacks directional info; SME refinement future work). STRM resource model: pilot doc → DocumentaryImpl; source-item → ConcreteImpl; AppSec Core V1 → Reference Document; Core entity → Concept.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Log Integrity And Access Controls. Protect security records against tampering and uncontrolled access. Integrity, tamper evidence and access restrictions are strongly present in requirements, but not…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.568; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000010 at Mechanism level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Release Promotion And Human Approval Integrity. Promotion between environments must respect explicit gates, including human approval for irreversible actions. Promotion gates are enforced and irrever…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.544; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000011 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Log Integrity And Protected Access. Protect security records against tampering and uncontrolled access. integrity traceability and records. integrity protection

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.544; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000012 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Governed Promotion And Release Approval. Separate security signal generation from approval decisions and enforce explicit release gates. policy and gate enforcement. approval

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.528; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000013 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Non-Revealing Error Surface Control. Keep client-visible failures controlled, generic and resistant to information leakage or enumeration. policy and gate enforcement. error surface control

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.496; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000014 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Secret Handling And Operational Identity Integrity. Secret leak prevention, protected storage, rotation, operational identity, usage isolation and secret-change governance must operate as one coheren…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.493; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000015 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Trust Boundary Clarity And Protected Data Flows. Define trust zones and data flows explicitly, with protected boundaries and visible controls at each crossing point. Trust boundaries and critical flo…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.462; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000016 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Secret Scope And Binding Controls. Bind pipeline, workload and deploy actions to explicit operational identities and prefer federated or short-lived credentials where possible. Separate secret use by…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.458; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000017 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Release Promotion Gates. Separate security signal generation from approval decisions and enforce explicit release gates. policy and gate enforcement. policy

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.457; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000018 at Mechanism level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Record And Periodically Review Exceptions Against The Intended Baseline. Record approved deviations and periodically review whether the current baseline still matches intended security posture. integ…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.453; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000004 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Schema And Allowlist Enforcement. Constrain structured payloads and accepted values through explicit schema, type and allowlist checks. validation and analysis. schema enforcement

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.444; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000002 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Protected Secret Storage And Controlled Retrieval. Store secret material only in protected secret-management surfaces and retrieve it through controlled mechanisms rather than through embedded or bro…

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.440; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000005 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Pre-Use Data Validation Discipline. Re-validate data before internal business use, persistence or downstream propagation instead of trusting it by arrival. validation and analysis. data flow guarding

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.437; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000003 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Security Finding Triage And Correction Closure. Security-test findings must be triaged, tracked to correction, constrained by severity-based closure targets and revalidated or formally excepted when …

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.435; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000019 at ControlObjective level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 5. Article 5 (Principles relating to processing of personal data) requires that personal data shall be:

reference-element.description: Vault-Backed Secret Storage. Keep secret material in protected secret-management systems rather than in ordinary configuration or embedded code. identity and trust control. storage

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.433; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000007 at Practice level. Secondary disclosure.

source-element.description: GDPR Article 32. Article 32 (Security of processing) requires the controller and the processor to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate…

reference-element.description: Access Abuse Monitoring And Audit Trail. Make rejected access, abuse signals and externally visible calls auditable and operationally reviewable. rollout recovery and runtime records. audit

mapping.rationale: Cosine similarity 0.586; threshold mapping → intersects-with. Claim EU_RGPD-CLAIM-000038 at Practice level. Primary anchor (item highest-similarity claim).

reference-element.description: Security Logging And Audit Trail Assurance. Security event coverage, structured audit records, tamper resistance, governed retention, centralized ingestion and logging-pipeline health must operate as…

reference-element.description: Human Review Of Security Test Signals. Separate raw automated signal from final release or correction decision through explicit human review and acceptance criteria. governance and review. release de…

reference-element.description: Access Abuse Detection And Auditability. Access surfaces must emit sufficient telemetry to detect abuse, prove rejected access and audit externally visible calls with reviewable context. Rate limits,…

reference-element.description: Message Integrity And Authorized Peer Validation. Sensitive or trusted interactions must verify message integrity and accept traffic only from explicitly authorized origins and destinations. Messages…
